reference: I am thirteen years old and for the last month or so, I have had really bad pains and a tingling feeling down the left side of my body and headaches. I cannot concentrate. Sometimes my heart starts beating really fast, and I get out of breath and have blackouts. I am scared; please help!
text: I am 13 years old, and for the last month or so I have had really bad pains and a tingling feeling down the left side of my body, and headaches. I cannot concentrate, sometimes my heart starts beating really fast, and I get out of breath and have blackouts. I am scared. Please help.
